ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for the (administrator) San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Shomer reported that this matter was discovered languishing, that there are no identified heirs, that it will need to escheat to the state, that they resumed their search for heirs to no avail, that they have provided notice to the Franchise Tax Board, that they communicated with the creditors, sent out certified letters asking for support on the claims with a due date of 2/4/16, that as of today they have not received anything, that claims will be paid if documentation is received, that if documentation is not received they will have to deny the claims and then give time for objections. Ms. Shomer asked for an additional 30 days to file a status or an additional 90 days to file a final petition. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or approval of a status report was continued to April 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
